title: BEM-833 direct repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 05:52 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem832_verify_bem831_and_triad.json')
status_in=prev.get('status')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='still_missing_dispatch_results' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    for name, wf in [('bem833_self_dispatch_probe.json','codex-runner.yml'),('bem833_claude_dispatch_probe.json','claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')]:
        p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')/name
        p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v6','workflow':wf,'workflow_id':wf,'ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-833 direct repair after BEM-832 missing dispatch result','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
        created_files.append(str(p))
    status='created_dispatch_probe_queue_items'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='runtime_repair_selected'
    next_action='parse dispatch results and patch Claude runtime workflow'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='response_repair_selected'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/provider prompt'
else:
    status='triad_present_selected'
    next_action='process response into agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-833','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem833_execute_direct_repair_after_bem832.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem833_execute_direct_repair_after_bem832.md').write_text('# BEM-833 | Execute Direct Repair After BEM-832 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem833_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-833'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem833_execute_direct_repair_after_bem832.json','governance/reports/bem833_execute_direct_repair_after_bem832.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem833_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the direct repair selected by BEM-832, creating dispatch probe queue items if dispatch results are still missing')
"""
No issue comments.
